calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-04-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:15am
Judge Pro Tem Marc Seidenfeld, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record, Dept. 525:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Soma Magazine, Inc., appears in Pro Per through Ali Ghanby; Respondent, the Print Shop, Inc., appears in Pro Per through Richard Lim. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Seidenfeld.
10:00am
Matter is submitted. Evidence from both parties was received but not marked, and was retained by the Court.
